subject: Re:
body:
Let them go, whenever they want..

Lyn and jojo keep asking to go to the philipines and take serious time off. I want to tell them 3 weeks at christmas ...do you have a view..lyn is constantly on my case and keeps asking for time now, is sept, oct..it's becoming a problem w/her which I need to deal with

G

PS My e mail has changed to gmax1@ellmax.com - plse make a note
